caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the white text "I NEVER SHIT" is seated in a studio environment. He is holding a red plastic cup to his lips, appearing to take a sip. In front of him is a professional black microphone on a stand. The background features a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt and grey pants, clothing racks with various garments, and framed pictures on the wall. In the bottom left corner, a logo contains the text "THE", and in the bottom right, a logo reads "RED VELVET POT". Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, slightly tilting his head and adjusting the cup as he drinks, while the rest of the setting remains static.
